name: dev-kit-mermaid-export
description: Convert local Mermaid files into high-quality SVG documentation assets. Ensures consistent styling and rendering.

sections.title: Batch Processing
bullets: Export single file, multiple files, or directory of diagrams.

sections.title: Typical Workflow
bullets: Plan: Identify source Mermaid files for export.
Normalize: Resolve output directory and file paths.
Process: Execute mmdc and validate SVG artifacts.
